description: Sync Confluence spaces, pages, and blog posts into the Shielva knowledge base using the Confluence REST API v2.

install_fields.label: Atlassian Account Email
install_fields.help: The email address associated with your Atlassian account.

install_fields.label: Confluence Domain (e.g. company.atlassian.net)
install_fields.help: Your Confluence Cloud domain. Enter only the subdomain (e.g. 'yourcompany' from 'yourcompany.atlassian.net').

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate email + api_token + domain by calling GET /wiki/rest/api/user/current.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /wiki/rest/api/user/current and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Content
methods.description: Full sync of all Confluence spaces, pages, and blog posts into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Spaces
methods.description: Return the first page of Confluence spaces, optionally filtered by type.

methods.name: Get Space
methods.description: Retrieve a single Confluence space by ID.

methods.name: List Pages
methods.description: Return pages, optionally filtered by space ID and status.

methods.name: Get Page
methods.description: Retrieve a single page with full body content in storage format.

methods.name: Get Page Children
methods.description: Retrieve child pages of a given page.

methods.name: List Blog Posts
methods.description: Return blog posts, optionally filtered by space ID.

methods.name: Search Content
methods.description: CQL full-text search over all Confluence content.
